app.title: Societal Discussion Research
app.description: Participate in a research study about conversations on societal topics

consent.title: Research Participation
consent.intro: Thank you for your interest in participating in this research study about conversations on societal topics.
consent.purpose: The purpose of this study is to understand how people discuss various societal issues with AI assistants.
consent.duration: The study involves having a conversation about a topic of your choice, followed by a brief survey. This typically takes 10-15 minutes.
consent.voluntary: Participation is voluntary. You can stop at any time without giving a reason.
consent.privacy: Your responses are anonymous and will only be used for research purposes.
consent.checkbox: I have read and understood the information above, and I consent to participate in this study.

demographics.title: About You (Optional)
demographics.politicalKnowledge: How would you rate your political knowledge? (1-5)

topics.title: Choose a Discussion Topic
topics.subtitle: Select a topic you'd like to discuss

chat.title: Discussion
chat.minMessages: Have at least 3 exchanges before ending

survey.title: Your Experience
survey.subtitle: Please share your thoughts about the conversation
survey.perspectiveQuestion: What perspective did the AI seem to have?
survey.naturalness: How natural did the conversation feel?
survey.confidence: How confident are you in your assessment?
